scores.correctness_notes: Accurately covers all three notice types, deduplication, persistence, charm observation via pebble_custom_notice event, and ops API. Matches gold standard well.
scores.hallucination_notes: The ops.testing.Notice class and Container notices parameter may not exist exactly as shown; the Scenario/Harness testing API details are plausible but not verified against gold standard. Minor risk of fabrication in testing section.
